resources.string: Search ingredients, foods, or dishes; aliases supported
No foods match the current filters.
This section is planned but not available yet.
Glycemic index ranks the rise in blood glucose after a fixed amount of available carbohydrate. It is affected by food variety, ripeness, processing, cooking, and the rest of the meal.
Glycemic load combines carbohydrate amount and glycemic index for the listed edible basis. It is approximately available carbohydrate multiplied by GI divided by 100.
The inflammation index is a research-oriented dietary index estimate, not a diagnosis. Interpret it with the overall dietary pattern rather than as an inherent property of one food.
Swipe left or right to view all columns
Delete this custom entry? This cannot be undone.
Scientific notes, e.g. botanical family / genus
Nutrition is derived from the source ingredient and cooking method.
You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
Use this page to verify new features and UI behavior.
Enter the verification password to open test pages.
Add isolated fake records for the current user.
For first use, please fill in your personal information so we can provide personalized dietary suggestions.
Blood glucose records will appear here.
Record medication, insulin, sleep, exercise, mood, and other context to review trends and manage blood glucose better.
Enter a valid blood glucose value.
Enter an integer number of minutes.
Choose the language used by the app

This app provides general health and nutrition information for personal reference only. It does not provide medical diagnosis, treatment, or emergency guidance. Consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.
HealthDietPro helps you organize personal health records and nutrition information. Your personal records remain under your control on this device.
This will clear the app cache to free up storage. Your account and data are not affected.
Applies to all users and Compose screens in this app
Tap to switch between Monday and Sunday
Tap to cycle system, dark, and light modes
Font size and text overflow behavior
Medicine catalog management will be available here.
No medicines yet. Add one before logging medication use.
Archived medicines stay linked to existing medication records but cannot be selected when adding a new record.
Delete “%1$s” from the medicine catalog? Existing medication records are retained.
This record will be permanently deleted.
Select measurement time and enter height. Unit: %1$s.
Select measurement time and enter weight. Unit: %1$s.
Select from history or enter a new name
Example: for 1 tablet of 25 mg, enter 1 and tablet here.
Strength is saved with the selected unit from units.json.
Your unsaved changes will be lost.
Camera permission is required to take photos
This medicine is past its expiry date. Do not take it unless a clinician confirms it is safe.
Tap a purpose to remove it from this record. This is especially useful for as-needed medicines.
This is a common confirm dialog component, used for destructive action secondary confirmation.
Shrink font first; degrade to selected mode when below min size
Shrink font size to fit when overflowing
Degrade to ellipsis when below this size
This is a long sample text used to demonstrate how the text overflow component renders in different modes.
Export the current user profile, records, preferences, and avatar
Replace current user data with a previously exported archive
The exported file is unencrypted and includes sensitive health data. Do not share it through untrusted channels.
Importing replaces the current user profile, records, preferences, and avatar. This cannot be undone.
Unable to complete the JSON operation
Delete "%1$s"? All data for this user will be cleared.
Could not identify province for current location
View BMI trend, reference ranges, and calculator
BMI is calculated as weight in kilograms divided by height in metres squared. It is a screening reference, not a diagnosis.
